IncidentDef.label: Horny tribe raid
IncidentDef.letterText: Attackers from {0} have arrived! Their gods demand your blood... and your buttholes, if possible! Their war cries were so unsettling and yet somehow made all your colonists feel horny, prepare for defense!

IncidentDef.label: Rapist raid
IncidentDef.letterText: Attackers from {0} have arrived! They have vile intentions... they're here to rape as many defenseless pawns as possible. Be ready...
